confirmation_scope: The user authorized the parent/run-management worker in chat to launch this corrected extLQG secure RTX 5090 run after this preflight succeeds. This implementation worker must not launch.

code.commit_policy: Use the committed branch head produced by the extLQG preflight pass.

requires_preflight: Verify Docker image tag exists before pod create.
Check secure RTX 5090 availability by datacenter.
After pod create, poll the .ssh object and prove SSH with nvidia-smi before setup.

launch_gate_table.value: 6D extLQG analytical teacher from issue 376d023, selected with extlqg_controller_gains
setup_task_model_pair h0 Feedbax GRU, hidden size 180, 5 replicates
6D force-filter feedback only; no previous-action/action-history network input
target-relative multitarget distribution inherited from 020a65b h0 no-PGD
AdamW, lr 3e-3, warmup/cosine schedule with alpha 0.01, gradient clip 5
12000 batches, batch size 64, vectorized 5-replicate axis, no PGD
6D extLQG teacher loading plus clean-action, perturbation-response, directional-JVP, and rollout-anchor losses

monitoring.startup_check: Verify SSH, nvidia-smi, CUDA JAX import, and BATCH progress after JIT.
monitoring.progress_signal: BATCH phase=guided_distillation_vectorized batch=<i>/<n> loss=<x> replicates=5 elapsed=<s>s
stop_debug_instructions: Stop and debug if the pod reaches EXITED or TERMINATED during boot.
Stop and debug if SSH cannot be proven from the .ssh object.
Stop and debug if CUDA JAX import fails after setup.
Stop and debug if no post-JIT BATCH line appears or batch progress is materially slower than the prior vectorized 5090 run.
